title: Queensland arts minister ignored recommendation that new theatre be named after poet Oodgeroo Noonuccal
summary_full: Exclusive: Queensland Performing Arts Centre board nominated Oodgeroo as  preferred name in 2024 but it was not one of four options put to public vote by LNPFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA Queensland government minister intervened to ensure that a new theatre would not be named after the Aboriginal poet Oodgeroo Noonuccal, overriding the theatre’s board, according to documents obtained under right to information laws.The late artist’s name is also set to be stripped from a state electorate, in draft electoral boundaries released by the state’s redistribution commission this week. The Liberal National party lobbied for the change. Continue reading...
